[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a social media profile page with a circular avatar of a blue-haired anime-style character and a grid of pinned video thumbnails.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the profile interface, featuring a circular profile image at the top, the displayed username and handle, follower statistics, a “Message” button, and a row of pinned video thumbnail tiles below.

Setting:
The image appears to be an in-app screen capture of a social media profile on a mobile device, with no visible outdoor or real-world location beyond the content shown in the thumbnail videos. Lighting and time of day are only suggested by the thumbnail imagery.

Visual Details:
The background of the profile page is dark. The circular avatar contains an anime-style character with bright blue hair and light skin, set against a blue-and-white graphic background. Beneath the avatar, the text “Neril SukaLoli” is shown in white with a yellow emoji face next to it, followed by “@iymneri1_” in smaller white text. Three centered statistics appear in white: “116 Following,” “6.8K Followers,” and “248.6K Likes.” Below are a rounded rectangular “Message” button and two smaller icon buttons to its right. A line of bracketed text appears: “[ 411, LC, ABS, SF ]” and another line reads “↓ am prem, intro, paid edit ↓.” Below that are interface icons: one looks like a bullet list or stacked lines with a small down arrow, and another looks like an upload or transfer icon. At the bottom is a three-column grid of video thumbnails; each thumbnail has a pink label reading “Pinned” at the top left of the tile. The thumbnails show vehicles: a car at sunset or dusk with visible warm light near the front, a gray or black car front view with text overlay, and a dark car at night or in a dim indoor setting with bright lights. Additional thumbnails below the first row show more close-ups of vehicles and a metal structure background, with one image showing a bright industrial or outdoor scene with fencing or racks.

Practical Summary:
The image is a mobile social media profile screenshot showing an anime-style avatar, username, follower counts, and action buttons. It also displays a grid of pinned video thumbnails featuring multiple car-related images.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
